# Transform vector to (a,b)

Transform vector to (a,b)

## Usage

``` r
transform_alpha(x, a = 0, b = 1)
```

## Arguments

- x:

  vector to transform

- a:

  lower bound of transform

- b:

  upper bound of transform

## Value

transformed vector

## Examples

``` r
transform_alpha(runif(100))
#>   [1] 0.056958405 0.729004848 0.731452220 0.270627362 0.891424722 0.101658784
```
